'''âj-y-y-r''' ('''kajayeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monitorize|monitorize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monitorize|monitorize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-y-y-r
|-
! Lemma
| kajayeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijayeroko|thijayeroko]] || [[word:jijayeroko|jijayeroko]] || [[word:shijayeroko|shijayeroko]] || [[word:kijayeroko|kijayeroko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojayeroko|thojayeroko]] || [[word:jojayeroko|jojayeroko]] || [[word:shojayeroko|shojayeroko]] || [[word:kojayeroko|kojayeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjayeroko|thĂŠjayeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠjayeroko|jĂŠjayeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠjayeroko|shĂŠjayeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠjayeroko|kĂŠjayeroko]]
|-

|-

|}
